activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor identification via occurrence in invoice
Priority 2: Controlled text matching for goods description

consignor.certificate_value:
Gösta Jacobsson & CO AB
Stora Åvägen 21
SE 436 34, Askim
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Gösta Jacobsson & Co AB
Stora Åvägen 21
SE 436 34 Askim
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Gösta Jacobsson & CO AB' from certificate matches invoice issuer 'Gösta Jacobsson & Co AB' considering allowed abbreviation of legal company form. Address and country Sweden match exactly after normalization. The consignor name is confirmed explicitly in invoice header and other address blocks, satisfying rule 4.1.0 and legal form abbreviation 4.1.3.6.

consignee.certificate_value:
Shenzhen Shuwu Industrial Co.,Ltd
13A ,Yantian Modern Industry
Service Center
3018 Shayan Road,
Yantian District, Shenzhen
China
consignee.invoice_value:
Shenzhen Shuwu Industrial Co., Ltd
13A, Yantian Modern Industry Service Center
3018 Shayan Road, Yantian District, Shenzhen
China
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Shenzhen Shuwu Industrial Co.,Ltd' from certificate matches invoice buyer 'Shenzhen Shuwu Industrial Co., Ltd' exactly after normalization including allowed punctuation and spacing. Address detail and China as country match exactly. Invoice contains a clear 'Buyer' field matching consignee, satisfying rules 4.2.0.2 and 4.2.2.1.

goods_description.certificate_value:
Spruce Lumber (Picea Abies)
52 packages, Whitewood, KD 18%, TP
goods_description.invoice_value:
Whitewood, KD 18%, TP
Spruce Lumber (Picea Abies)
goods_description.motivation: Goods description 'Spruce Lumber (Picea Abies), 52 packages, Whitewood, KD 18%, TP' in certificate corresponds to invoice goods description 'Whitewood, KD 18%, TP' and 'Spruce Lumber (Picea Abies)' lines. The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Spruce Lumber (Picea Abies)' is exactly found in invoice despite different line order. Package counts match. No semantical interpretation needed; normalization applied.

quantity.motivation: Quantity '214,600 m3' in certificate is exactly found as '214,600' in invoice total cubic meters. Both documents state 52 packages. Decimal truncation and comma as thousand separator normalized. Weight in invoice is given but not required for matching cubic meter quantity. Terms and units match; thus quantity is verified.

origin.motivation: Certificate states origin country as 'Norway'. Invoice also states 'Norway' as Country of Origin. However, certificate also indicates 'European Union' and 'Sweden' as consignor country, which normalizes to EU origin, while invoice country of origin is only Norway (non-EU). As per strict rules, the certificate's consignor country (Sweden, EU) and origin country (Norway) diverge. Furthermore, the invoice origin 'Norway' alone does not confirm EU origin as required by certificate's consignor location and original text. This mismatch on origin causes an overall mismatch.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Mismatch identified in origin country verification. Other control points match after normalization and allowed abbreviation.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet anger ursprungslandet som Norge medan fakturan bekräftar samma land som ursprung. Dock finns motstridigheter i ursprungslandshanteringen på grund av EU- och icke-EU-relaterade informationer, vilket gör att ursprungslandet inte kan verifieras med full säkerhet. Därför krävs manuell granskning.
